briefdescription.para: Creates a new Layout implementation without a LayoutManager.

simplesect.para: An IntrusivePtr to the new LayoutImpl

briefdescription.para: Gets the layout manager from the LayoutManager trait.

simplesect.para: Pointer to the layout manager, or nullptr if not set

briefdescription.para: Checks if this layout has a layout manager.

simplesect.para: True if a layout manager is set

briefdescription.para: Called during measure pass. Override to implement custom measurement.
Called during arrange pass. Override to implement custom arrangement.
Returns whether this view acts as a layout container.

simplesect.para: True if this view has a LayoutManager attached

detaileddescription.para: A reference counted object may only be deleted by calling Unreference()

briefdescription.para: Attaches a LayoutManager as a trait to this Layout.

detaileddescription.para: Must be called in OnInitialize() of derived classes, not in constructors (Self() is not available during construction).

briefdescription.para: This is the internal implementation class for Layout.

detaileddescription.para: Layout extends View with a LayoutManager that defines the layout algorithm. The LayoutManager is stored as a Trait (ReservedTraitId::LAYOUT_MANAGER), so there is no per-instance member variable overhead.

simplesect.para: LayoutManager for the layout algorithm interface
